description_long: This is a medium-sized hardcover book with a predominantly dark cover featuring a digital camouflage pattern across the middle. The lower portion of the front cover displays a barcode, a small American flag, and a label with fine print, suggesting official or military-related content. The back cover is similarly styled, with the camouflage band and a block of text in a bold, sans-serif font. The book's spine is thin and black, with no visible text or decoration. The overall appearance is utilitarian and modern, with a focus on subdued, functional design elements.
description: A dark hardcover book with a digital camouflage band and official-looking labels, featuring a modern, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: The front cover shows a digital camouflage band, barcode, American flag, and a label at the bottom.
description_view_1: The spine is thin, black, and featureless, with no visible text or decoration.
description_view_2: The back cover displays the camouflage band and a block of bold text in a sans-serif font.
description_view_3: The opposite edge of the spine, also thin and black, with no visible features.
attribute_publisher_logo: A small rectangular logo with an American flag motif is visible on the lower front cover.
